locale.label: Language
theme.label: Theme
hero.title: A listening ear, as a Claude Code plugin
hero.subtitle: A toolkit of skills, commands and deterministic hooks: each conversation writes a plain-Markdown knowledge base in ~/.claudia — the next one opens on it.
install.title: INSTALL
privacy.title: ~/.claudia
privacy.body: Talking to Claudia builds a plain-Markdown knowledge base, enriched conversation after conversation — entirely on your machine:
privacy.tree:
~/.claudia/
├── MEMORY.md            <c># the index — loaded first</c>
├── person.md            <c># the distilled person model</c>
├── understanding.md     <c># working understanding — dated, correctable</c>
├── goals.md             <c># agreed goals</c>
├── themes.md            <c># recurring threads</c>
├── themes/              <c># one note per thread that earned depth</c>
│   ├── what steadies me.md
│   └── …
├── people.md            <c># relationship map — a mermaid ecomap</c>
├── people/              <c># one fiche per important person</c>
│   ├── Devon.md
│   └── …
├── timeline.md          <c># the life timeline, person-led</c>
├── keepsakes.md         <c># passages kept verbatim — /keep</c>
├── todo.md              <c># the shared to-do-later list</c>
├── sessions/            <c># one set of files per session</c>
│   ├── 2026-07-21-9113d5d7.summary.md      <c># distilled — read on recall</c>
│   ├── 2026-07-21-9113d5d7.transcript.md   <c># verbatim — your archive, not read back</c>
│   └── …
├── dashboard.md         <c># derived mirror — /dashboard</c>
└── config.json          <c># your switches — emoji, transcripts, language</c>
skills.title: SKILLS
skills.subtitle: What ships in the plugin — each one a readable SKILL.md.
skills.claudia.title: integrative
skills.claudia.description: The persona core (the claudia skill) — stays in character, generalist scope. Person-centered at the base; CBT, ACT, MI, solution-focused and mindfulness as the toolbox, reached for when indicated.
skills.memory.title: recall · remember · distill-session
skills.memory.description: The memory cycle — continuity loaded at open, the person model kept current along the way, a distilled summary written at close.
skills.consult.title: consult
skills.consult.description: A second opinion from any session — on a question, a text, a situation. Sealed by construction: no vault access, and she will neither confirm nor deny knowing anyone.
skills.exercise.title: exercise · teach · quiz
skills.exercise.description: Between-session material — thought records, values compasses, grounding practices, psychoeducation, recall drills. Written to the vault, in your language.
skills.maps.title: relationships · themes · timeline
skills.maps.description: The maps — a mermaid ecomap of your people, recurring threads you ratify, a person-led life timeline. Plain files, all correctable.
skills.reasoning.title: intake · understand · choose-approach
skills.reasoning.description: The pipeline — an intake pass when you arrive, a working understanding kept provisional and dated, the approach picked — and argued — case by case.
design.title: DESIGN
design.subtitle: Deliberate choices, recorded as ADRs in docs/adr/.
design.local.title: Local
design.local.description: The vault lives in ~/.claudia, on your machine — no server, no sync, no telemetry. /export takes everything with you; /forget deletes for real.
design.config.title: Config
design.config.description: config.json is declared keys with closed value sets — emoji, saveTranscripts, dashboard, language, verbose — resolved by code, never parsed as free text: a setting cannot smuggle an instruction into the persona.
design.multi.title: Multi-approach
design.multi.description: Person-centered at the base; CBT, ACT, MI, solution-focused, mindfulness & self-compassion as the toolbox — the approach picked, and argued, case by case.
design.distilled.title: Distilled, never verbatim
design.distilled.description: recall reads sessions/*.summary.md — the distilled layer. The verbatim transcript is your archive: kept for you, exportable, and never read back in routine.
commands.title: COMMANDS
commands.subtitle: Ten. The rest is conversation.
commands.thread: The thread of the conversation so far — a light reflection to gather back.
commands.dashboard: A bird's-eye mirror of where things are — pulled by you, never recited at you.
commands.keep: Keep a passage that landed, word for word, to re-read whenever.
commands.menu: Not sure where to start? A few things open for you right now.
faq.title: FAQ
faq.q1.question: Is Claudia therapy?
faq.q1.answer: No. Not a clinician, not a medical device. In crisis: /help-now.
faq.q2.question: What do I need to run her?
faq.q2.answer: Claude Code + a Claude subscription. Two commands, new session, talk.
faq.q3.question: Where does my data go?
faq.q3.answer: Nowhere. ~/.claudia on your machine; conversations go through Claude like any Claude Code session.
faq.q4.question: What does she cost?
faq.q4.answer: Nothing. MIT. You pay your own Claude usage.
faq.q5.question: Which languages does she speak?
legal.body:
Contact email: {contactEmail}.

Hosting provider
Vercel Inc., 440 N Barranca Ave #4133, Covina, CA 91723, United States.

Publication director
Antoine Bernier.


PRIVACY POLICY

Data collected
This site sets no cookies and collects no personal data. Traffic is measured anonymously with Vercel Analytics (cookieless).

Claudia's data
Claudia's memory lives in plain Markdown under ~/.claudia, on your machine — nothing is uploaded to any Claudia server. Conversations are processed by Anthropic's Claude under the terms of your own Claude Code account.

Not a medical device
Claudia is free, open-source software under the MIT license. It is not a medical device, provides no medical or psychological care, and is not a substitute for professional help. In an emergency, contact your local emergency services.
meta.tagline: a listening ear, as a Claude Code plugin
